news.headline: CAF’s Motsepe to visit both Senegal and Morocco amid AFCON fallout
news.summary: Senegal, who were stripped of the AFCON title, are appealing the decision for the trophy to be awarded to Morocco.

news.headline: Lebanon displaced share stories at theatre turned refuge
news.summary: Some families forced to flee the war in Lebanon have found shelter at a Beirut theatre, where has well as a roof over their heads they have also been given a chance to take the stage to tell their story.

news.headline: How Orban benefits from Hungary's tailor-made election system

news.headline: France to ramp up drone stocks by 400 percent to face Russia threat
news.summary: France will sharply increase its stockpiles of explosive drones – by as much as 400 percent by 2030 – under sweeping new defence plans unveiled Wednesday. Paris is accelerating rearmament in response to what it sees as a growing threat from Russia.
